name: TransDigm Group
confidenceReason: Existential leverage gamble: 5.7x Net Debt/EBITDA on cyclical aerospace. Liquidity shock forces punitive dilution. Sharpe 0.15.
bullCase: 45.6% operating margins are exceptional. ~$4.76B annualized EBITDA demonstrates strong cash generation.
bearCase: Running a cyclical aerospace business with 5.7x leverage is an existential gamble. A liquidity shock will collapse the interest coverage ratio, forcing punitive equity dilution.

cagrModel.basis: 10yr avg PE; DY includes normalized special dividends
